title: Merry Christmas Pick n Mix Sweets Gift Jar by Dolci Di Lechlade Classic British Sweet Shop Secret Santa Stocking Filler Advent Reindeer Candy Cane
features: MERRY CHRISTMAS SWEETS GIFT JAR, Including delicious versions of Candy Canes, Reindeers, Christmas Trees, Elves, Penguins, North Poles, Snowmen, Santa. Gift message and gift wrap available.
description: Product description Great convenient Merry Christmas sweets gift! Christmas treat , stocking filler, secret santa. Indulge in a delightful assortment of gummy and chewy sweets with the Dolci Di Lechlade Pick and Mix Gift Jar. This retro sweet hamper features a carefully curated selection of jelly treats that will transport you back to cherished childhood memories. Perfect for sharing with friends and family or as a thoughtful gift, this sweet collection comes beautifully presented in a gift jar. The sweets are made with quality ingredients including natural plant and vegetable concentrates for colouring. The hamper offers a variety of textures and flavours to satisfy your sweet cravings. Whether you're hosting a party, looking for a special present, or simply treating yourself, this pick and mix selection promises a truly enjoyable confectionery experience. Ingredients Sugar, Glucose Syrup, Wheat Starch, Water, Modified Maize Starch, Modified Potato Starch, Acids (Lactic Acid, Malic Acid, Citric Acid), Flavouring, Plant and Vegetable Concentrates (Black Carrot, Spirulina, Safflower), Vegetable Oil (Coconut), Glazing Agent (Carnauba Wax).
